docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,500.00 FILED BY GILL, DANIEL AS TO DEFENDANT SHEVICK, SCOTT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-24-2013 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-24-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-24-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $0.) SERVED MAY-05-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SHEVICK, SCOTT
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-24-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GILL, DANIEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHEVICK, SCOTT $4,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,550.00, INCLUDED IN THE JUDGMENT IS STATUTORY DAMAGES OF $3,000.00 DUE TO DEFENDANT'S VIOLATION OF CIVIL CODE SECTION 1950.1 IN BAD FAITH. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
